name: Salmon Stuffed Potato Skins
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons (or 3 tablespoons) sour cream per person
a few tablespoons red or black caviar per person
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Prick each potato with a fork and rub with salt. Bake until tender, about 1 hour. Cut in half and scoop out the flesh without breaking the skin, leaving only a thin layer of potato on the inside. Chop the smoked salmon and divide between potato halves. Spoon in 2 or 3 tablespoons of sour cream and top with red or black caviar, or some of each. Serve.
